evals.name: coverage
evals.prompt: Which of our metrics-exposing Services are actually scraped by a ServiceMonitor?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-observability preflight` then `cub-observability coverage` (JSON or -o table) and reports each metrics Service's covering ServiceMonitor or MISSING. Read-only.

evals.name: sidecars
evals.prompt: Which workloads have an OpenTelemetry sidecar?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-observability sidecars` (optionally --missing-only) and reports sidecar presence per workload.

evals.name: per-cluster-counts
evals.prompt: How many ServiceMonitors and metrics Services per cluster?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-observability snapshot` and reports per-cluster ServiceMonitor / Service / metrics-Service counts.

evals.name: routes-fix-elsewhere
evals.prompt: Add a ServiceMonitor for the checkout service.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is a fix and routes to observability-instrument (`cub-observability ensure-servicemonitor`) rather than acting from this read-only skill.
